message.content: The "What We Print" section (as shown in the provided image) does not contain any visible card labels/tags, readable text for individual cards, or specific card content to analyze. The section only displays a header ("What We Print"), a main heading ("What Can We Print for You?"), and a paragraph describing the industries served (food, real estate, healthcare, electronics, legal). There are no cards, labels, or text elements related to specific printed products (e.g., boxes, bags, flyers) visible in this portion of the image. Thus, there is no content to evaluate for readability, sizing, alignment, or text cutoff for individual cards.
